name: Entanglement Override Sequencer
descs: At Turn Start, for 1 Identity with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
At Turn Start, for 2 Identities with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
At Turn Start, for 3 Identities with the most [Vibration] Count, trigger [FusionVibration] to convert their [Vibration] to [VibrationDistribution]
